positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of an optimistic sunrise over a calm body of water, featuring a silhouette of mountains and gentle waves. Use a color palette of deep indigo, warm gold, coral blush, and muted turquoise. The composition should be centered, utilizing strong negative space for maximum print impact. Style should be modern geometric line art combined with watercolor wash textures, ensuring clean, crisp lines and clear delineation between the silhouette and the sky. Ideal for apparel printing, vector quality, clean edges.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logos, messy lines, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, low resolution, smudged, copyrighted, celebrity, cartoon, realism
